prompt: Create a highly detailed cinematic sci-fi concept art scene of EXR-17 exploring an alien Earth-like valley. The main subject is one large white-and-gray mechanical quadruped rover in the foreground, walking through a shallow rocky stream; it has four heavy articulated legs, one long front-right manipulator arm touching the water with a sampling tool, a boxy armored chassis covered in panels, bolts, antennas, cables, blue indicator lights, and a tall sensor mast with three prominent camera lenses. Surround it with lush green moss, wet stones, tiny glowing blue flowers, splashing water, waterfalls, steep cliffs, distant mountains, and a bright blue sky with dramatic clouds. Add a colossal green-and-blue planet or moon dominating the upper-right sky with a bright sun flare near its edge. Include exactly 3 small survey drones in the sky: one large drone at upper right projecting a blue scanning beam downward, one small drone at upper left over the mountains also projecting a blue beam, and one distant drone near the center-right valley projecting a faint blue beam. Add translucent holographic AR mapping overlays on the right side of the landscape with exactly 3 visible labels: “MINERAL DEPOSIT”, “WATER SOURCE”, and “CONSERVATION ZONE”, plus blue wireframe scan grids and triangulation lines. In the upper-left corner, overlay a rectangular blue holographic display panel showing a female android aboard a spaceship: a reclining silver-white female android torso with exposed cybernetic joints, long pale hair, tubes and cables around her head and shoulders, glowing blue circuitry, and medical diagnostic UI graphs; her face is covered by a soft opaque square blur. The inset panel should have a neon cyan frame and contain exactly 4 main UI diagnostic regions: a waveform graph, a small data table, a circular targeting reticle, and thin technical readout lines. Overall style: ultra-detailed Japanese sci-fi key visual, photorealistic 3D concept art mixed with anime-inspired cyberpunk aesthetics, sharp focus, high dynamic range, vivid cyan-blue holograms, intricate hard-surface robotics, volumetric light, sparkling water, dense environmental detail, epic scale, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond the specified labels and rover marking.
